{% if not env("HWARO_DEV", default="") %} {# CSP via because GitHub Pages cannot set response headers. Header-only directives (frame-ancestors / X-Content-Type-Options / HSTS) are out of scope here. 'unsafe-inline' on script-src is required by the hwaro-emitted `hljs.highlightAll()` call and the on-demand Mermaid loader; cdn.jsdelivr.net is allowed solely so Mermaid diagram pages can pull the renderer. Set HWARO_DEV=1 (e.g. `HWARO_DEV=1 hwaro serve` from docs/) to drop the CSP locally so hwaro's live-reload script can run. #} {% endif %} {% if page.title and page.title != site.title %}{{ page.title }} - {{ site.title }}{% else %}{{ site.title }}{% endif %} {{ og_all_tags }} {% if page.permalink %} {% set rel = page.permalink | replace(base_url, "") %} {% if page.language == "ko" %} {% set en_url = base_url ~ (rel | replace("/ko/", "/")) %} {% set ko_url = page.permalink %} {% else %} {% set en_url = page.permalink %} {% set ko_url = base_url ~ "/ko" ~ rel %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {# hwaro's `highlight_css`/`highlight_js` emit root-absolute /assets/ paths that ignore the base_url subpath, 404ing under /noir/. Reference the vendored assets via base_url ourselves instead. #} {{ auto_includes_css }} {% if page.language == "ko" %}본문으로 건너뛰기{% else %}Skip to content{% endif %}
{% if page.language == "ko" %}시작하기{% else %}Get Started{% endif %} {% if page.language == "ko" %}사용 가이드{% else %}Usage{% endif %} {% if page.language == "ko" %}개발{% else %}Development{% endif %} {% if page.language == "ko" %}블로그{% else %}Blog{% endif %} GitHub
EN KO
